name: New Rule Proposal
about: Propose a new detection rule
labels: new-rule
---

## Rule ID
e.g. `security/xss-vulnerability`

## Category
security / performance / quality / ai-codegen

## What It Detects
Describe the problematic pattern.

## Bad Code Example
```js
// Code that should be flagged
```

## Good Code Example
```js
// How the code should look instead
```

## Severity
critical / high / warning / info

## Auto-fixable?
Yes / No — if yes, describe the fix.
